name: TIBCO Integration & Analytics API
what_it_does: TIBCO REST and messaging API for enterprise integration, messaging, and analytics platform. Enables AI agents to manage TIBCO Cloud Integration deployment and flow management, handle TIBCO Messaging (EMS/FTL) publish/subscribe workflows, access TIBCO Spotfire analytics and dashboard data, retrieve TIBCO DataSynapse grid and event processing data, manage API Management and gateway configuration, handle TIBCO BusinessWorks process orchestration, access TIBCO StreamBase real-time event streaming, retrieve MDM and data management workflows, manage TIBCO Cloud connectivity and connector management, and integrate enterprise messaging with middleware and analytics systems.
use_cases: Managing enterprise integration flows from iPaaS automation agents
Accessing TIBCO Messaging publish/subscribe from event-driven architecture agents
Retrieving Spotfire analytics from business intelligence automation agents
Integrating TIBCO platform with enterprise middleware from digital transformation agents
not_for: Modern cloud-native teams without legacy TIBCO middleware investment
Simple REST API integration without enterprise messaging requirements
Small businesses without enterprise integration platform budget
best_when: An enterprise with TIBCO middleware investment wants AI agents to automate integration flow management, messaging workflows, analytics access, and hybrid cloud connectivity.
avoid_when: OPERATIONAL RISK: TIBCO manages enterprise messaging and integration for mission-critical systems — automated changes to EMS topics and BusinessWorks processes can disrupt production systems. Real-time event processing errors can cascade through downstream systems. TIBCO licensing models are complex — automated resource usage must not exceed contract terms.

auth.notes: TIBCO uses OAuth 2.0 for TIBCO Cloud platform API access. On-premises EMS and BusinessWorks use proprietary authentication. Developer portal with API documentation. Java, C++, Python, .NET SDKs for messaging clients. TIBCO Cloud is subscription SaaS; on-premises products use traditional licensing.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise integration platform subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: TIBCO Cloud subscription; on-premises perpetual and subscription licensing
pricing.notes: Santa Clara, California. Private (Vista Equity Partners, acquired 2014; taken private from NYSE 2014). Founded 1997. Pioneer in enterprise middleware (TIB - The Information Bus). $1.5B+ revenue. Used by financial services, airlines, and telecom. Acquired Spotfire (analytics), ibi (analytics), Citrix Analytics. Competes with MuleSoft and IBM for enterprise integration.

performance.rate_limits: Platform API rate limits per OAuth client; EMS throughput depends on deployment

known_agent_gotchas: OPERATIONAL RISK: TIBCO EMS and BusinessWorks manage mission-critical enterprise messaging — automated changes require careful staging
Multi-product complexity — TIBCO platform includes 20+ products; each has different API surfaces and auth
No public MCP server — REST API with developer portal; on-premises products may lack REST API
Private equity ownership (Vista Equity) — verify API roadmap and product consolidation direction
Legacy on-premises API surfaces alongside TIBCO Cloud — behavior and auth vary significantly
EMS messaging SDK-based — JMS-compatible messaging client, not REST; different from HTTP API
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise messaging and integration. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU data residency. Mission-critical messaging and legacy on-premises integration.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise messaging and integration. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU data residency. Mission-critical messaging data.
